notes:
Tested the whole story end to end. Performance was good (no stutter anywhere).

One bug appeared (but maybe in Windows version as well):
The scene in the back room of the dessmakers shop when the multiple Talorel appear. When tring to read the book from the inventory multiple times the wrong (not active Talorel) is reading the book and after some tries the game stopped responding to inputs but was still running (moving graphics).
title: Heaven's Hope - Special Edition
